# HB Brickworks

> Brickwork done right, first time.

HB Brickworks is a Basingstoke-based brickwork partnership serving homeowners, developers, and contractors across Hampshire and within approximately one hour of Basingstoke. The business is run by two experienced tradesmen with over a decade of hands-on brickwork experience across domestic and commercial projects. No subcontracted crews — the people you speak to are the people on site.

## Services

- [General Brickwork](https://www.brickhausltd.co.uk/services/brickwork): Boundary walls, facades, repointing, and feature detailing with precise, well-finished results.
- [Patios & Block Paving](https://www.brickhausltd.co.uk/services/patios): Brick and block paving in herringbone, basket-weave, stretcher, and bespoke layouts with proper falls, drainage, and edging.
- [Garden Walls & Boundaries](https://www.brickhausltd.co.uk/services/garden-walls): Bespoke garden walls, boundary walls, retaining walls, and decorative brickwork.
- [New Builds & Extensions](https://www.brickhausltd.co.uk/services/new-builds): Full brickwork packages for new build homes and extensions, working alongside main contractors or directly with homeowners.
- [Restoration & Repointing](https://www.brickhausltd.co.uk/services/restoration): Sympathetic brick replacement and repointing on period and modern properties, crack repair, sill and coping replacement.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.brickhausltd.co.uk/): Landing page with hero, service overview, testimonials, and call to action.
- [About](https://www.brickhausltd.co.uk/about): Background on the partnership, experience, values, and working approach.
- [Services](https://www.brickhausltd.co.uk/services): Overview of all five service categories with links to individual service pages.
- [Contact](https://www.brickhausltd.co.uk/contact): Contact form for project enquiries and quotes.

## Key Facts

- Location: Basingstoke, Hampshire, UK
- Service area: Approximately one-hour radius from Basingstoke, covering Hampshire and beyond
- Team: Two experienced tradesmen/partners
- Experience: Over a decade of hands-on brickwork
- Client types: Homeowners, builders/contractors, developers
- Email: bowya1990@hotmail.co.uk

## Values

- Direct accountability from quote to final clean-down
- Honest pricing and transparent quotes
- Tidy, well-managed sites
- Quality materials — good bricks, proper mortar mix
- No subcontracted crews
- Works to architects' details, builders' specs, or client ideas
